stories.title: My Family
stories.story: I live with my family. I have a mother, a father, and a little sister. We eat breakfast together every morning. On weekends, we go to the park and have fun.

stories.title: My Favorite Toy
stories.story: I have a favorite toy. It is a small robot. My robot can walk and make sounds. I play with my robot every afternoon. My friends like my robot too.
